arts.ttl: Bellamy 'still can't believe' he is Wales manager
arts.sum: Craig Bellamy says thinking of himself as Wales' football manager still gives him goose bumps four months on.

arts.ttl: Craig Bellamy makes Joe Rodon transfer admission as Leeds United star bids for 50th Wales cap
arts.sum: The Wales boss has long been an admirer of the centre-back

arts.ttl: Wales v Iceland talking points as Craig Bellamy’s side chase promotion
arts.sum: The Dragons drew 0-0 away to Euro 2024 quarter-finalists Turkey on Saturday.

Wales' chances of earning promotion from UEFA Nations League B rest on a crunch match against Iceland on Tuesday. Craig Bellamy's side currently sit second in group 4, two points clear of Iceland, an...

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Joe Rodon provides injury update
arts.sum: Joe Rodon is closing in on his 50th Wales cap this week away from Leeds United, helping his side to a 0-0 Nations League draw on Saturday. His Wales contingent return to Cardiff City this Tuesday to take on Iceland, with Joe Rodon eyeing his 50th cap after an injury scare on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Joe Rodon ready for landmark Wales cap after starring in bruising Turkey clash
arts.sum: The Leeds defender was named player of the match after the Dragons held on for a gutsy Nations League draw in Kayseri.
